heading.title: Frequently Asked Questions
heading.subtitle: Find answers to common questions below.

faqs.question: What services do you offer?
faqs.answer: We provide web development, UI/UX design, and full-stack solutions tailored to your business needs.

faqs.question: How can I contact support?
faqs.answer: You can contact us through our contact form or email us at support@example.com.

faqs.question: Do you offer custom solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in custom-built applications based on your requirements.

faqs.question: What technologies do you use?
faqs.answer: We use modern technologies like React, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, and more.

faqs.question: How long does a project take?
faqs.answer: Project timelines vary depending on complexity, but we always aim for timely delivery.
